reasoning.primary_focus: Audio generation layers are critical for fixing the audio loss plateau
reasoning.rank_choice: Rank 32 chosen based on model size (5,771,283,456 parameters)
reasoning.alpha_choice: Alpha 64 set to 2x rank for stable training
reasoning.target_selection: Prioritizing audio-specific modules over general attention
